evidence_summary: Apache combined access log contains 47 requests to /api/checkout/session/placeOrder from six distinct IPs within 90 seconds (Magento checkout endpoint). ModSec engine records rule 913101 (scanner detection) for two of those IPs. ClamAV freshclam log shows a signature update completed 2 minutes before the first hit. The curator is asked to reconstruct the attack timeline and identify whether the IPs are coordinated.
